title: GoldMining Commences 2026 Exploration Drilling Program at its Yarumalito Gold-Copper Project, Colombia
author: Goldmining Inc.
description: GoldMining Inc. has commenced a fully-funded 1,200-metre diamond core drilling program at its 100%-owned Yarumalito Gold-Copper Project in Colombia's Mid Cauca belt. The program will test a newly refined geological model targeting the P-1 porphyry unit and epithermal veins, building on historical intercepts showing significant gold-copper mineralization. The project has an existing inferred mineral resource estimate of 66.3 million tonnes at 0.58 g/t gold and 0.09% copper.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned only as a neighboring project operator (Marmato Gold Mine) for geographic context; no direct operational or financial information provided about the company.
Mentioned only as a neighboring project operator (Guayabales Project) for geographic context; no direct operational or financial information provided about the company.

The company is actively advancing exploration at a well-positioned project with existing mineral resources, demonstrating operational progress and commitment to unlocking growth potential. The fully-funded drilling program and refined geological model indicate positive momentum in project development.

title: Unlocking Value: The Data-Driven Case for Scalable Gold Assets
author: Usa News Group
description: Global gold demand exceeded 5,000 tonnes in 2025 with central banks acquiring 863 tonnes, creating a supply crunch that benefits scalable mining operators. Major gold producers including B2Gold, Aris Mining, Aura Minerals, Perseus Mining, and Lake Victoria Gold reported strong 2025 results and positive production outlooks for 2026, supported by record gold prices and institutional demand.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Achieved record annual revenue of $3+ billion in 2025, sold 927,797 ounces at $3,299/oz average, adjusted net income doubled year-over-year to $612 million. Goose Mine reached commercial production and company remains focused on ramping throughput for long-term growth.

Delivered record 2025 financial results with 256,503 ounces gold production (22% YoY increase), $909 million revenue, and $464 million adjusted EBITDA. Generated $322 million cash flow after sustaining capital, fully funding growth initiatives with Marmato development ahead of schedule.

Signed road relocation agreement unlocking significant reserve potential at Borborema mine, growing reserve base 82% to 1.5 million ounces. Updated feasibility study shows 20.5-year mine life with $612.5 million after-tax NPV at $2,274/oz gold price assumption.

title: High-Margin Mining: How the Smart Money Is Navigating the New Gold Supercycle
author: Usa News Group
description: Gold is experiencing a structural shift in global demand with record ETF inflows and major banks raising price targets to $6,300/oz. High-margin gold producers are positioned to generate unprecedented free cash flow as industry costs remain flat while prices consolidate at record levels. Key players including Lake Victoria Gold, Equinox Gold, Coeur Mining, New Gold, and Aris Mining are capitalizing on this supercycle with strong production results and cash generation.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Delivered record 2025 production of 922,827 ounces with $2.71 billion revenue and $1.34 billion adjusted EBITDA. Reduced debt by $1.1 billion and declared inaugural dividend. 2026 guidance of 700,000-800,000 ounces with expansion projects expected to add 400,000-500,000 ounces annually over five years.

Nearly doubled 2025 revenue to $2.1 billion with record production of 419,046 oz gold and 17.9M oz silver. Adjusted EBITDA tripled to $1.0 billion with $666 million free cash flow. Achieved net cash position of $554 million. Pending New Gold acquisition expected to add significant production in H1 2026.
Mentioned primarily in context of pending acquisition by Coeur Mining (approved by shareholders in January 2026). No independent operational results or guidance provided in the article.

Delivered record 2025 results with 256,503 oz gold production (22% YoY increase), 82% revenue surge to $909 million, and 185% EBITDA jump to $464 million. Net debt reduced to $86 million. 2026 guidance of 300,000-350,000 ounces with long-term projects targeting ~1 million ounces annual production.

title: SHAREHOLDER INVESTIGATION: Halper Sadeh LLC Investigates PHLT, ARIS, MURA on Behalf of Shareholders
author: Prnewswire
description: Halper Sadeh LLC is investigating potential securities law violations and fiduciary duty breaches related to recent sales/mergers involving Performant Healthcare, Aris Water Solutions, and Mural Oncology.
